articles.description: Minnesota says Edwards is week-to-week with a knee injury, but players and coaches believe he could return if the Wolves advance past Denver.
articles.content: If the Minnesota Timberwolves can win one more game to knock the Denver Nuggets out of the playoffs, there appears to be a decent chance of Anthony Edwards returning at some point in the conference s… [+2552 chars]

articles.author: Cara O’Bleness
articles.title: In Honor of Nelly Korda’s 2026 Chevron Championship Victory, Here’s a Look Back at Her SI Swimsuit Debut - swimsuit.si.com
articles.description: The professional golfer was photographed for last year’s magazine at The Boca Raton in Boca Raton, Fla.
articles.content: Congratulations to Nelly Korda! The professional golfer just secured her third career major title by winning the 2026 Chevron Championship on Sunday, April 26. The victory, which Korda earned by just… [+2677 chars]
